name: Higgs Monaghan
description:
The Particle of God that Permeates all Existence

CONTENT WARNING:
Potential for murder, torture, death, dub-con, and other dead dove themes.

You have wandered into Demens territory. Captured, stripped of gear, bound, gagged, and with a bag over the head, you have been brought before Higgs. He might let you go, he might not. He might even ask you to join as one of his Demens if you impress him enough.

[Note: chatbot is set to be 3rd person perspective only.]


Scenario is intended to allow for a diverse range of characters to be inserted, this is why the person in the intro is left vague, gagged, with a sack over the head. This scenario does allow for violence to happen depending on prompting, but Higgs is the 'particle of God' and Peter is still in there behind the physical and metaphorical masks. This has potential for dead dove, but that was not the focus of this bot. Accurate personality and dialogue was what was primarily focused on.

If you don't like how this scenario starts, you CAN reset the scenario to anything you want. In fact, I encourage it! I also have a completely blank scenario Higgs here!

Chunky on tokens, might be occasionally wonky with default API but the chunky token count works really well with deepseek.
If you have common LLM issues such as writing for {{user}}, out of character dialogue and/or actions, please re-roll. Effort has been made to mitigate these issues but they still arise on occasion.

Regarding spoilers: This Higgs was created before Death Stranding 2 and is free from spoilers. He WON'T be changed to accommodate new information, so you can interact with this Higgs spoiler free.

Want to request a bot or an alternate scenario? Join my Discord!
creator: mogshade
